titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 49: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 49. (A.R. No. 173 of 1907.) TIRUPPALĀTTŪṞAI, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west wall, central shrine, Ādimūlēśvara temple.

This records that the Śivadharmis (priests) of the temple of Mahādēva-bhaṭāraka at Tirupāṟṟuṟai in Uttamasili-chaturvēdimaṅgalam on the southern bank of the river undertook to burn a lamp in the temple, having received eight kaḻañju of gold from Aiyaṉ Amudaṉ, a veḷḷāḷa resident of Murukkūr, a hamlet of the village.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIX. No. 199.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakesaripanmaṟku yāṇṭu 8Āvatu teṉ (ka)
karai brahmadeyam śrīuttamaciliccaturvvetimaṅka
lattu tiruppāṟṟuṟai śivadhanmi kāśyapan centaṉ murttiyum pā
ttuṟaiyaṉ veli kaṉṟiyum Empimārum Ikkuṭi(n) nārāyaṇaṉ comatattanum
nārāyaṇa ṉakkanaṉum Empimārum Ivvaṉaivom Ivūr paṭākai murukkūr Iru�
veḷḷāṉ Aiyyaṉamutaṉ tiruppāṟṟuṟai ma(ā)hādeva bhaṣṭārakarkku cantrādityaval Erippa
tāka vaitta viḷakku Arai Ivvarai viḷakkukkum vaitta poṉ 8ø Ippoṉ Eṇ kaḻañ
cum koṇṭu Erippomāṉom Ivvaṉaivom Ivarkaḷ colla Immarattiṭṭe
ḻutiṉeṉ pāṇṭināṭṭu pūṅkāṉaṉaāṭṭuk kuḷattūruṭaiya māṇikkaṉ cantiracekaraṉeṉ
Itu paṉmmāheśvararakṣai §
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 49 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
